flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Gallaudet University are 43% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($43.1k vs $75.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Gallaudet University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (998 → 812).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gallaudet University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (57.9% → 47.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Gallaudet University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.7k → $19.7k).
